name: textvision
description: Local image-to-text evidence plugin for text-only AI models and agents.

interface.shortDescription: Give text-only models a local image-understanding fallback
interface.longDescription: TextVision converts local images into structured text evidence using OCR, SVG text extraction, metadata, and explicit limitations so text-only AI models and agents can reason about image content without inventing visual details.
defaultPrompt: Use TextVision to process this local screenshot for a text-only model.
